name: Cold Banana Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Box instant vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer vanilla wafers and sliced bananas at the bottom of a dish.
2. In a bowl, mix instant vanilla pudding with 1 1/2 cups milk until well combined.
3. Add Cool Whip, 1 cup of Eagle Brand evaporated milk, and vanilla extract to the pudding mixture. Mix thoroughly.
4. Pour about half of this mixture over the wafers and bananas in the dish.
5. Make another layer of wafers and sliced bananas.
6. Pour the remaining mixture over the second layer of wafers and bananas.
7. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used.
